meanings.definition: narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay
German writer of novels and poetry and plays (born 1927)
a police informer who implicates many people
bulky food like grass or hay for browsing or grazing horses or cattle

examples: The owners decided to grass their property

meanings.definition: spread out clothes on the grass to let it dry and bleach

examples: He told on his classmate who had cheated on the exam
